tool_args.label: Bx12 service and street design improvements results

payload.claim_text: Making bus routes work better: Fordham Road (Bronx) 20% increase in bus speeds, 10% increase in bus ridership, 71% increase in retail sales (at locally-based businesses, compared to 23% borough-wide)
